feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Workflow rejected by 2nd Level Approver shouldn't be visible to Employee(initiator)
entry.content:
Dear Community Members,

Here i do have a scenario for one of my client regarding the workflow.

In a particular WF, there are 2 levels of approver who will approve the Workflow. 

Suppose 1st level of approver approves the WF but 2nd level approver rejected the WF. Now client ask is Employee(who is the initiator of the WF) shouldn't have rights to view the rejection of 2nd level approver.

It should visible by only 1st level approver

Is it possible to achieve this, is yes please do let me know how this can be achieve

Thanks

Rashmi

entry.title: How can we hide the information from one inactive employee in SAP Successfactors? European GDPR
entry.content:
Hi,

How can we hide the information from one inactive employee in SAP Successfactors? +

We have to comply with European GDPR.

If an inactive employee request to hide this information before the purge at 5 years, we have to hide the information for this inactive employee for all the users but keep the information in case for a legal situation.

entry.title: Internal Error ocurred while processing
entry.content: Good morning SAP Team, I hope you are doing well. Do any of you know what is the reason for the following error that people storie gives us when creating a report. There we have several calculated columns, is this what causes the error in the report? How can we solve this problem?

entry.title: S4Hana / Fiori: Staff changes >> Changes to Change Record Processors
entry.content:
What is the most efficient solution to automatically update processors in the Change Record for each task based on staff changes in our organization? If we have staff changes, they are updated in SuccessFactors. Is there an API or something that can manage the updates between SuccessFactors and processors loaded in SAP S/4HANA Change Record?

This seems like a table export/import process from SF to S4Hana somehow, but what is required to enable this solution?

entry.title: How to Automatically Delete EC Alerts when Contract End Date is Emptied?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a business rule which creates EC alerts when a fixed term employee reaches contract end date.

The problem is that the alerts doesn't automatically get deleted when the contract end date value is emptied (when employee becomes permanent).

What is the possible workaround? It seems that the Alert.Delete Old Pending Alert Flag works only if there is a new alert to insert (e.g. new Contract End Date is entered) but not if Contract End Date is removed.

Thank you.

 

Kind regards,

Gem

entry.title: Discrepancy between 'Completion Percentage' value in Story report and Employee Profile
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

I want to see if anyone is experiencing the same frustration or has a potential solution.
We see that Story report is pulling up incorrect output for "Completion Percentage". The response that we received from the SAP team on Incident raised for this issue was that the discrepancy between "Completion Percentage" value in Story report and Employee Profile is an expected behavior. KBA note 3260246 was created identifying this issue as a problem.

We are being told that the story report result of profile percentage is based on current database value. When you access Employee Profile (PP3) page, it will calculate real time the profile percentage and save the latest percentage into database. That's why the displayed values are inconsistent and the value will refresh after go to PP3 page. But this does not seem like a reasonable long-term solution.

We are being told that keeping the percentage value of all users up to date will consume a lot of computing resources, so the gap of story report and PP3 page is current expect behavior. 

The answer from SAP is not sufficient.

We need a report showing the latest profile completion percentage. HRBP's and managers need to be able to report on this data in order to identify and inform individuals through communication to complete their profiles. Possibility for generating Ad Hoc reports with the latest (correct) "Completion Percentage" field as reportable is really needed for better HR report activity.

Has anyone else experienced this problem? Have you been able to achieve a workaround / solution? Have you explored any other options to get this data? Would highly appreciate your ideas.

We have created an enhancement request, so please do go and vote for it.   https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/294162

Thank you so much for your help, community.

entry.title: SuccessFactors - Matrix Managers sync from Position to Hire Wizard
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Is it possible to get the matrix manager values, which are maintained in the Position, and get these values populated to the hiring wizard while adding a new an employee to the position.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: SuccessFactors - France - Siret - How to manage Siret ?
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Do you know how to manage Siret in SF, several Siret in a same Work location?

Ex : 1 work location (Address) with 2  legal entities (LE1, LE2) so 2 Branch ID (=Siret)

In specific fields for France we can find Siren but not Siret.(legal requirement - each employee is liknked to one Siret)

Regards

entry.title: What is the connection between EC and JPB?
entry.content:
Hello, 

i have a question about EC and JPB:
what is the connection between EC and JPB and is there a pictorial representation of it?

entry.title: To trigger mail to the external mail ids in workflow
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The requirement is to send an email to the external mail ids security department upon the initiation of a leave request, regardless of approval status & regardless of them present in the system as an employee. To achieve this, we need to include the specific person in the Workflow as a contributor.

Currently, in SuccessFactors, we can only add external email IDs as CCs, who receive notifications after approval. Please suggest if we can include external email IDs as contributors or can we send mail notifications to them even if they are not present in the system as employee.
Thanks.

entry.title: Successfactors employee central
entry.content: We are facing issue with View pending workflows quick card in Test instance. if we click view pending workflows quick card in Test instance home page, it will take us to Production data center.

entry.title: Concurrent Employment / Rehire with new employment: Reuse Data Records from Custom MDF Objects
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any way to reuse Data from the previous employment (Empoyment Data and Custom MDF Data) in case of concurrent employment or rehire with new employment? 

If there is no standard way, is there any known Workaround?

Thank you so much and KR,

M.

entry.title: Global Assignment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently we are using custom portlet for Global Assignment. We are wanting to implement standard Global Assignment functionality and have all the custom fields from custom portlet in Global Assignment. Can we create all these fields in Global Assignment and then populate all the values from standard to custom portlet when Add global assignment event has taken place.

Also, Could you help us with best practices on implementing global assignment as to how the design should be.

Regards,

Vamsi

entry.title: Delete Previous Attachment from Personal Information and Work Permit Portlet for new time slice
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Please guide me on a way (either via business rule or some other way) to automatically remove previous attachments from Personal Information and Work Permit Portlet as soon as new time slice of these portlet is created/inserted.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Reports to Support AAP Reporting
entry.content:
Hi there! Is there a good system provided/generated report to use for Affirmative Action Plan reporting purposes? For instance, a report of promotions and transfers showing old and new values for: job title, department, location and manager? 

Or does anyone have guidance on how to create a report to show these old and new values? We've created a canvas report, but it's limited to only reporting on 1-2 previous fields. 

Thank you!

entry.title: How can I remove "Manager" as a recipient of a specific Completed Document Email Notification?
entry.content: Our Document Completed Notification setting is set to be sent to "Manager and Employee." There is ONE template I would like to go to Employee only. Is there a way to remove "Manager" as a recipient of a specific template?

entry.title: How can I make a bar graph to see how many people are in each month from January to December?
entry.content:
I would like to calculate the number of people who are active in Employment Status for each month in 2023. How can I make a bar graph to see how many people are in each month from January to December?

(in SF Story Report)

entry.title: Setting a field in mdf object mandatory if current user is a specific permission group
entry.content:
Is there a possibility to set a field in an mdf object mandatory if the current user is within a specific permission group? Like:

User A (Permission Group A) selects MDF object, creates a new entry, field A, B and C are mandatory
User B (Persmission Group B) selects MDF object, creates a new entry, field A, B and C are not mandatory.

I didn't find a solution for this case - neither in business rules nor in Ui rules.

Thank you for providing support.

entry.title: Onboarding activation email not getting triggered for new hires
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We have one IAS related issue for one of the client who recently, enabled IAS for ONB2.0 but when we are adding any new hire to onboarding and initiating onboarding activation mail is not getting triggered for new hires to create their account and also when checked in Execution Manager Dashboard for real time sync it shows Completed with errors.

 

Further when checked Admin Alerts for error following error is seen

We have done all the configurations based on this KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3204536

Also, when tried to manually sync onboarding users using read job in IAS Console following error comes up and users fail to sync in IAS:

error=HTTP operation failed invoking https://a76nl88ar.accounts.ondemand.com/scim/Users with statusCode: 400, Response: {"schemas":["urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error"],"status":"400","detail":"Invalid user attribute: sourceSystemId"},

Please let me know why I am getting these errors and how can i rectify this issue.

Regards,

entry.title: Highlight fields in EC
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to highlight newly created fields in EC in the same way like standard fields are setup?

Thank you and regards,

Aneta

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
